critical_items: purgeExpiredAuditEvents: BEFORE DELETE trigger fires on all DELETEs including raw SQL — $executeRawUnsafe does NOT bypass DB triggers. Function is permanently non-functional in production.
important_items: Unbounded batch size in purgeExpiredAuditEvents — PostgreSQL max 65535 bind params, needs BATCH_SIZE=1000 loop
minor_items: PHI deny-list 'state' and 'name' entries are overly broad — could strip legitimate non-PHI fields
